fields.Name: Active Users
fields.Description: Returns all active users with basic profile info. Designed as a reusable building block for composed queries.
fields.TechnicalDescription: Simple base query selecting active users from vwUsers. Marked as Reusable so other queries can reference it via {{query:"Demos/Active Users"}} composition syntax.

fields.Name: Recent Entity Changes
fields.Description: Returns recent record changes grouped by entity name. Accepts a lookbackDays parameter to control the time window.
fields.TechnicalDescription: Parameterized reusable query using Nunjucks template for lookbackDays. Groups record changes by entity and provides count/date range metrics. Can be composed into other queries with static or pass-through parameters.

fields.Name: User Activity Summary
fields.Description: Composed query that joins Active Users with Recent Entity Changes to show each user's recent activity level. Demonstrates the {{query:"..."}} composition syntax.
fields.TechnicalDescription:
This query demonstrates MJ query composition by referencing two reusable queries:
1. {{query:"Demos/Active Users"}} - provides the user base
2. {{query:"Demos/Recent Entity Changes(lookbackDays='30')"}} - provides change metrics with a static 30-day lookback

At execution time, the composition engine resolves these references into CTEs before the SQL is sent to the database.
